rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE D.F. & A.J. RAVETTI FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Respondent, Mary Ravetti, To First Cause Of Action Of Second Amended Petition Of Petitioner, Dav Id N. Ravetti.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend if petitioner can, in good faith, plead a relevant lack of capacity. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wedndesday, March 25, 2015.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RANDALL P. TREFZGER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Taylor R. Smith'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To M. Tresger'S Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is overruled. Taking the allegations as true, which the Court must for this motion, the petition supports standing for the petitioner under Probate Code section 11700. The validity of the Ohio court's issuance of letters to petitioner and that court's rulings with respect to those letters is not properly before this Court, which does not have jurisdiction over the Janice Weyer estate proceedings. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wedndesday, March 25, 2015.
